name: Apify
api_notes: The API is a comprehensive RESTful interface providing control over all major platform aspects, including Actors, runs, storage, and scheduling.

evidence.claim: Apify is a cloud-based platform for web scraping, data extraction, and automation that allows users to build and run Actors.
The Apify API is a RESTful API that allows programmatic control of the platform, with authentication via API tokens in the header.
Apify provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for AI agents.
Search citation: API integration | Platform | Apify Documentation

one_liner: Apify is a cloud-based platform that provides tools for web scraping, data extraction, and browser automation through serverless programs called Actors.
mcp_notes: Apify maintains an official MCP server (mcp.apify.com) to allow AI agents to interact with the Apify platform and its Actors.
auth_notes: Authentication is primarily handled via secret API tokens, which can be passed as a 'Bearer' token in the Authorization header (recommended) or as a URL query parameter. Additionally, the platform supports agentic payments (x402/Skyfire) for specific use cases.
access_notes: Apify offers a free plan with $5 of monthly compute credits which provides access to the platform and API, with no credit card required to start.
